specs.name: message_length
specs.spec: number of Unicode code points in the raw text (len(text))

specs.name: word_count
specs.spec: count of non-empty tokens after splitting on Unicode whitespace runs (text.split())

specs.name: digit_count
specs.spec: count of characters c where c.isdigit() (Unicode-aware)

specs.name: uppercase_ratio
specs.spec: uppercase_alpha / total_alpha over chars where isalpha(); 0.0 if no alpha chars

specs.name: count_links
specs.spec: number of non-overlapping matches of url_regex (case-insensitive)

specs.name: count_currency
specs.spec: total occurrences of any character in currency_charset

specs.name: urgency_count
specs.spec: number of non-overlapping matches of urgency_regex (case-insensitive, word-bounded)

structural_features.note: has_url/has_phone/has_email are DERIVED from the raw text via the regexes above (same code path as training-time inference). The port must derive them from text, not receive them as input.

scaler.rule: divide each feature i by max_abs[i] (index in global feature_order)

classifier.predict_rule: predict classes[1] iff p_positive >= threshold else classes[0]

feature_order.layout: [ tfidf block (vocabulary index order), structural block (names order) ]
